steps.title: Factor 63 and x²
steps.content: To express $63x^2$ as a product, factor both parts:$$63x^2 = (7 \times 9) \cdot (x \times x)$$

steps.title: Regroup as the product of two factors
steps.content: Pair each factor of 63 with a factor of $x^2$:$$(7 \times 9) \cdot (x \times x) = (7 \cdot x) \cdot (9 \cdot x) = (7x)(9x)$$That matches choice B — B is correct.
